name: Beef Montparnasse
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds round steak, cut into serving size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pressure cooker.
2. Add shortening and brown the steak.
3. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Securely close the cover.
5. Place the pressure regulator on the vent pipe.
6. Cook for 15 minutes.
7. Allow the pressure to drop naturally.
8. Remove the bay leaf.
9. Thicken the gravy, if desired.
